analytics_region.description: Specifies the GCP region for storing Apigee analytics data; must be a supported region for Apigee analytics.

api_consumer_data_encryption_key_name.description: Specifies the name of the Cloud KMS key used for encrypting consumer data, required for enhanced security of sensitive information.

api_consumer_data_location.description: Specifies the geographic location where Apigee stores consumer-managed data, such as analytics and trace data. Must match the valid GCP regions for Apigee organizations.

authorized_network.description: Specifies the Google Cloud VPC network to connect the Apigee organization to, required for private service access. Must be in the same project as the organization.

billing_type.description: Defines the billing type for the Apigee organization, specifying whether it uses a trial, pay-as-you-go, or subscription model.

control_plane_encryption_key_name.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key name used for encrypting the control plane, must be in the format projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{cryptoKey}.

description.description: Defines the description for the Apigee organization, providing context or purpose for its usage.

disable_vpc_peering.description: Indicates whether VPC peering should be disabled for the Apigee organization; set to true to disable.

display_name.description: Specifies the user-friendly name for the Apigee organization; must be unique and can contain up to 255 characters.

properties.description: Defines key-value pairs for configuring the organization's runtime behavior, such as analytics, features, and other settings.

retention.description: Specifies the number of days to retain analytics data; must be between 1 and 3650 days.

runtime_database_encryption_key_name.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key name used to encrypt the runtime database, must follow the format `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{cryptoKey}`.

runtime_type.description: Specifies the runtime type for the Apigee organization, such as 'CLOUD' or 'HYBRID'.

timeouts.description: Defines the durations for create, update, and delete operations, allowing customization of execution time limits.

project_id.description: The ID of the project to create.
